tasks.title: Retrieve Current RAM Usage
tasks.description: Execute system command to obtain real-time memory utilization data for stability assessment.

solution.approach: Analyze the task to understand the requirement: retrieve real-time RAM usage for system stability assessment. Identify that this is a monitoring/diagnostic task and should leverage existing CLI tools rather than writing new Python code.

Design the solution using standard Unix/Linux system commands. Use `free -h` command which provides human-readable memory information including total, used, free, shared, buff/cache, and available RAM. This command gives immediate real-time data suitable for stability assessment.

Execute the `free -h` command via run_shell_command to capture current RAM usage statistics. The output will be displayed directly without redirection to files, showing memory utilization in human-readable format.

Validate the output by checking that the command executed successfully (exit code 0) and that the response contains expected memory metrics (total, used, free, available). Ensure no errors are present in stderr.
